brief_summary: Four-row horizontal comparison ladder — Durock T1, Gazzew Boba U4T, Gateron Lanes, Drop Holy Panda X — each row pairing a force-curve bump glyph with its spring-weight spec and a short character label. Positions the T1 as the widest actuation-to-bottom-out spread in the set paired with the least plateau, directly against the other three tactiles this publication has already covered.
data_sources: durock-t1-deep-dive.mdx § 'Where the T1 sits against the field' — 'the widest actuation-to-bottom-out spread in the set, at 55g into 67g, paired with a bump shape that resolves faster than the U4T's long plateau'
